endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.Marketplace REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/privateStoreClient/isPrivateClient
endpoints.description: Check if client is private or not.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.
